reviews.comment:
Solo para cargar nafta y se recomienda con efectivo, porque muy a menudo no tienen sistema o luz para el pago electrónico. El comedor solo tiene comida envasada, no elaborada como hamburguesas o sandwiches. Eso sí, la atención es correcta.

(Translated by Google)
It's only for getting gas, and cash is recommended because they often don't have a working system or electricity for electronic payments. The food stall only has packaged food, not homemade items like hamburgers or sandwiches. However, the service is decent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNXM2NEFREAE
